parity.notes: Counted on the reference solutions (both arms structurally parallel): 1 static class/module + NormalizeUsage (2 branches, 3) + BillBasic (1) + BillPro (tier branch, 2) + BillCapped (cap branch, 2) + CheaperPlan (tie branch, 2). Complexity = 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. Second-wave hardness pair (truncation ties, overflow-if-unnormalized, tier boundary); NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).

wedgeWhitelistCheck: Calor-arm contracts are all binary comparisons over i32 parameters, `result`, and signed 32-bit integer literals: (>= cap 0); result bounds (>= result 0/300/500), (<= result 1/cap/70500/80400/100000). Modeled per modeled-forms §1 (i32 -> BitVec32) and §2 (binary comparison operators, integer literals, simple variable references). No function calls, no floats, no strings, no arrays, no generic-typed values appear in any contract. All functions are pure (§E{}), so no effect-manifest coverage is required.
